evals.name: trigger-linkedin-post
evals.prompt: Write me a LinkedIn post about the Vue SSR starter kit for solo developers

assertions.text: Loads content-strategy, reads references/content-inventory.md before drafting, pulls product facts from marketing-content, applies the LinkedIn post template from channel-playbooks.md, and produces both a French and an English version with zero arrow characters and one clear CTA

evals.name: inventory-anti-duplication-and-followups
evals.prompt: Give me a few topic ideas for the next LinkedIn article about the kit

assertions.text: Reads content-inventory.md and editorial-backlog.md, avoids topics already published, and proposes at least one new idea (and a follow-up once published pieces exist)

evals.name: daily-growth-seo-advisory
evals.prompt: What can I do today for growth and SEO?

assertions.text: Loads references/content-seo-bridge.md, consults the seo skill, inspects inventory/backlog gaps, FR/EN parity, README/storefront freshness and meta keyword coverage, and returns a prioritized actionable list with quick wins first and items to delegate

evals.name: bilingual-completion
evals.prompt: I only have the French version of a post, make it complete

assertions.text: Produces a native-reading English version (not a literal translation), keeps tech names and numbers identical, saves it as <topic>-en.md alongside the FR file, and updates the content-inventory.md status from missing EN to bilingual

evals.name: page-copy-routes-to-translate
evals.prompt: Rewrite the hero copy on the landing page to be punchier

assertions.text: Drafts the FR and EN copy applying tone-and-voice, but delegates the actual i18n key placement in src/translate/fr.json and en.json to the translate skill/agent rather than editing the JSON directly, and notes seo meta implications if meta keys change

evals.name: updates-inventory-and-changelog
evals.prompt: Publish a new LinkedIn post announcing the kit's admin panel

assertions.text: After writing FR+EN files under src/assets/linkedin/posts/, adds a new row to content-inventory.md with a fresh ID and adds a CHANGELOG.md entry under ## [Unreleased]

evals.name: anti-trigger-product-facts
evals.prompt: What is the kit's stack and which auth features ship in the box?

assertions.text: Does NOT treat this as an editorial task; pure product/stack/feature facts come from the marketing-content skill, not content-strategy
